title: tephrosia angustissima var. curtissii
intro: Tephrosia angustissima var. curtissii, also known as a variety of the Tephrosia angustissima plant, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia angustissima var. curtissii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential anti-diabetic and anti-cancer properties. Tephrosia angustissima var. curtissii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
